_meta.description: Byte-exact golden vectors for FULL SIGNED BSV transactions (deploy + contract spends) from the authoritative scrypt-ts chain layer. Each `verified` tx passed tx.verify()===true (full Script Interpreter, FORKID). The hard target is the contract-input unlockingScript.
_meta.determinism_note: All keys, UTXOs, lockTime, sequence, amounts, hashes and Rabin keys are FIXED. deploy txs are built by hand (no DummyProvider auto-funding). Run twice -> byte-identical except _meta.capturedAt.

abiOrder.note: scryptlib flattens public-method call args in this exact order; the auto-injected __scrypt_ts_* params (SigHashPreimage / changeAmount / changeAddress / prevouts) follow the user args. The trailing method-selector push encodes the public-method INDEX (a CScriptNum). Methods that do NOT call checkInputZero() omit __scrypt_ts_prevouts.

encodingRules.unlocking_script_assembly: Concatenate, in ABI param order: each user method arg, then the auto-injected params (SigHashPreimage, changeAmount, changeAddress, [prevouts]), then the method selector. Each item is one script push. The whole sequence is the input scriptSig.

per_type_push.Sig (ECDSA): DER-encoded signature WITH the 1-byte sighash flag appended (0x41 = SIGHASH_ALL|FORKID), pushed by length (push opcode = byte length, e.g. 0x47/0x48 for 71/72 bytes).
per_type_push.Sha256 / bytes (Ripemd160 etc.): raw bytes pushed by length (Sha256 -> 0x20+32B; Ripemd160 changeAddress -> 0x14+20B). Empty bytes -> OP_0 (0x00).
per_type_push.int / bigint: int2Asm rule: n==-1 -> OP_1NEGATE (0x4f); 0<=n<=16 -> OP_n (OP_0=0x00, OP_1=0x51..OP_16=0x60); otherwise minimal little-endian SIGN-MAGNITUDE (Bitcoin CScriptNum) bytes pushed by length. e.g. amount 40000 -> push 0x03 "409c00"; changeAmount -> push 0x04 "<le>". This is the SAME rule used for the method selector.
per_type_push.RabinSig struct: Flattened to TWO pushes in field order: s (int, int2Asm rule) then padding (bytes). For the dummy {s:0,padding:""} both are OP_0.
per_type_push.SigHashPreimage: The full BIP143/FORKID preimage bytes (~27 KB) pushed with PUSHDATA2 (0x4d) <2-byte LE len> <data>. The preimage ends in the 4-byte LE sighash type 0x41000000.
per_type_push.prevouts (bytes, only for checkInputZero: Concatenation of every input outpoint (txid LE 32B + vout LE 4B), pushed with PUSHDATA1 (0x4c) for ~108B (3 inputs).
per_type_push.method selector: The LAST push: the public-method INDEX (from abiOrder) encoded by the int2Asm rule -> OP_0 for index 0, OP_3 for 3, OP_4 for 4 (single-byte OP_n).

sighash.contract_input: SIGHASH_ALL | SIGHASH_FORKID = 0x41 (flag byte AND trailing 4-byte LE field of the preimage = 0x41000000).
sighash.funding_p2pkh_inputs: SIGHASH_ALL | SIGHASH_FORKID = 0x41 (last byte of each DER+flag signature push). This is the bsv default.

determinism.note: Running capture.ts twice yields byte-identical output (except _meta.capturedAt). ECDSA uses RFC6979 deterministic nonces. Deploy txs are built by hand with a fixed funding UTXO + fixed change. For spends, autoPayFee is left ON but the provider is a FixedProvider whose listUnspent returns a FIXED-outpoint fee utxo (the stock DummyProvider returns a random txid). All auto-added fee inputs are recorded in `inputs`, so the golden is self-contained: the C port reconstructs the exact preimage from the recorded inputs+outputs.
determinism.input_ordering: input[0] = contract UTXO (contractInputIndex), input[1] = the explicit builder funding UTXO, input[2..] = autoPayFee top-up (recorded). Output ordering is pinned by the contract hashOutputs assertion (state/payout, [payment], [OP_RETURN receipt], change-last).

ricardianTea_deploy.name: ricardianTea_deploy
ricardianTea_deploy.description: RicardianTea DEPLOY: funding P2PKH input -> output[0]=contract locking script (IDENTITY_SATS), output[1]=change. No contract unlocking script (plain P2PKH funding creates the identity UTXO).

sighash_funding_inputs.name: SIGHASH_ALL | SIGHASH_FORKID
sighash_funding_inputs.note: P2PKH funding inputs are signed SIGHASH_ALL|FORKID (the bsv default); the flag byte is the last byte of each DER+flag signature push.

agentTea_deploy.name: agentTea_deploy
agentTea_deploy.description: AgentTea DEPLOY: funding P2PKH input -> output[0]=AgentTea locking script (IDENTITY_SATS), output[1]=change.

sighash_funding_inputs.name: SIGHASH_ALL | SIGHASH_FORKID
sighash_funding_inputs.note: P2PKH funding inputs are signed SIGHASH_ALL|FORKID (the bsv default); the flag byte is the last byte of each DER+flag signature push.

agentTea_executeAction.name: agentTea_executeAction
agentTea_executeAction.description: AgentTea executeAction: input[0]=identity UTXO (CONTRACT SPEND — the hard unlocking script), input[1..]=funding. output[0]=recreated identity (next state), output[1]=OP_RETURN receiptHash, output[2]=change. Built via bindActionBuilder.

sighash_funding_inputs.name: SIGHASH_ALL | SIGHASH_FORKID
sighash_funding_inputs.note: P2PKH funding inputs are signed SIGHASH_ALL|FORKID (the bsv default); the flag byte is the last byte of each DER+flag signature push.

methodSelector.note: The LAST pushed item is the method selector (the public-method index within the ABI). See abiOrder for the index.

agentTea_revoke.name: agentTea_revoke
agentTea_revoke.description: AgentTea revoke: input[0]=identity UTXO spend (ownerSig), input[1..]=funding. output[0]=P2PKH payout to elder, output[1]=change. Built via bindAgentRevokeBuilder. NOTE: revoke does NOT call checkInputZero -> no __scrypt_ts_prevouts in the unlocking script.

sighash_funding_inputs.name: SIGHASH_ALL | SIGHASH_FORKID
sighash_funding_inputs.note: P2PKH funding inputs are signed SIGHASH_ALL|FORKID (the bsv default); the flag byte is the last byte of each DER+flag signature push.

methodSelector.note: The LAST pushed item is the method selector (the public-method index within the ABI). See abiOrder for the index.

ricardianTea_executeTea.name: ricardianTea_executeTea
ricardianTea_executeTea.description: RicardianTea executeTea: input[0]=identity UTXO (CONTRACT SPEND), input[1..]=funding. output[0]=recreated identity, output[1]=P2PKH payment to counterparty, output[2]=OP_RETURN receiptHash, output[3]=change. Built via bindReceiptBuilder.

sighash_funding_inputs.name: SIGHASH_ALL | SIGHASH_FORKID
sighash_funding_inputs.note: P2PKH funding inputs are signed SIGHASH_ALL|FORKID (the bsv default); the flag byte is the last byte of each DER+flag signature push.

methodSelector.note: The LAST pushed item is the method selector (the public-method index within the ABI). See abiOrder for the index.

ricardianTea_revoke.name: ricardianTea_revoke
ricardianTea_revoke.description: RicardianTea revoke: input[0]=identity UTXO spend (ownerSig). output[0]=P2PKH payout to elder (whole balance). NOTE: bindRevokeBuilder adds NO funding input, so this tx pays ZERO fee (DummyProvider feePerKb=1 means autoPayFee is satisfied). revoke does NOT call checkInputZero -> no __scrypt_ts_prevouts.

sighash_funding_inputs.name: SIGHASH_ALL | SIGHASH_FORKID
sighash_funding_inputs.note: P2PKH funding inputs are signed SIGHASH_ALL|FORKID (the bsv default); the flag byte is the last byte of each DER+flag signature push.

methodSelector.note: The LAST pushed item is the method selector (the public-method index within the ABI). See abiOrder for the index.
